session.user:
Run the fast CI checks for this Python project. Execute: 1. `make lint` (or `uv run ruff check src/ packages/ tests/`) 2. `uv run ruff format --check src/ packages/ tests/` 3. `uv run ty check src/ packages/` 4. `uv run pytest tests/unit/ packages/ -x -q --timeout=30`
Run each and report ALL results. DO NOT fix anything - just report what passes and fails.
session.assistant: I'll run the fast CI checks for this Python project. Let me execute each command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/ packages/ tests/
Run ruff linting on source, packages, and tests

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff format --check src/ packages/ tests/

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ty check src/ packages/

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run unit tests and package tests with timeout

E501 Line too long (150 > 100) --> src/erk/cli/commands/pr/view_cmd.py:278:101 | 276 | … 277 | … 278 | …fo, and body content. Returns plan title, state, labels, timestamps, and header metadata.", | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ 279 | … 280 | …tput_types=(PrViewResult,)) |

tool_use.param: Run unit tests and package tests

Traceback: ../../_temp/uv-python-dir/cpython-3.13.12-linux-x86_64-gnu/lib/python3.13/importlib/__init__.py:88: in import_module return _bootstrap._gcd_import(name[level:], package, level) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_dash_data.py:6: in <module> from erk.cli.commands.exec.scripts.dash_data import _serialize_plan_row E ImportError: cannot import name '_serialize_plan_row' from 'erk.cli.commands.exec.scripts.dash_data' (/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/dash_data.py) =========================== short test summary info ============================ ERROR tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_dash_data.py !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! stopping after 1 failures !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
session.assistant:
## CI Check Results
Here's the summary of the fast CI checks:
### 1. Ruff Linting - FAILED **ruff check failed** with 3 issues found:
- `src/erk/cli/commands/pr/list_cmd.py:461:101` — E501 Line too long (150 > 100) - `src/erk/cli/commands/pr/view_cmd.py:278:101` — E501 Line too long (150 > 100) - `tests/unit/cli/test_pr_json.py:116:54` — UP017 Use `datetime.UTC` alias (fixable)
### 2. Ruff Format Check - PASSED All files are properly formatted (1676 files already formatted).
### 3. Type Checking (ty) - PASSED All checks passed with no type errors.
### 4. Unit Tests - FAILED **pytest failed** with import error:
- `tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_dash_data.py:6` — ImportError: cannot import name `_serialize_plan_row` from `erk.cli.commands.exec.scripts.dash_data`
**Root causes:** 1. Two lines exceed 100 character limit in PR-related files 2. One type compatibility issue in test file (should use `datetime.UTC` instead of `timezone.utc`) 3. Test file references a function `_serialize_plan_row` that doesn't exist in the source module
